protocol.name: linux_dmabuf_unstable_v1

protocol.description:
This protocol allows clients to create wl_buffers backed by DMA-BUF file descriptors, enabling zero-copy sharing of GPU-rendered frames with the compositor.
Warning! The protocol described in this file is experimental and backward incompatible changes may be made. Backward compatible changes may be added together with the corresponding interface version bump.

interface.name: zwp_linux_dmabuf_v1
interface.description: A global factory for creating dmabuf-based wl_buffers.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Objects created through this interface remain valid.

request.name: create_params

description.summary: create a temporary object for buffer parameters

request.description: Create a zwp_linux_buffer_params_v1 object to which dmabuf FDs are added before creating the actual wl_buffer.

event.name: format
event.description: This event advertises one buffer format that the server supports. All the supported formats are advertised once when the client binds to this interface. A roundtrip after binding guarantees that the client has received all supported formats.

event.name: modifier
event.description: Advertises format+modifier combinations. If modifier is DRM_FORMAT_MOD_INVALID, modifier_hi is the upper 32 bits and modifier_lo is the lower 32 bits of the modifier.

interface.name: zwp_linux_buffer_params_v1

description.summary: parameters for creating a dmabuf wl_buffer

interface.description: This temporary object is used to collect dmabuf FDs and metadata before creating a wl_buffer.

description.summary: delete this object, used or not

request.name: add

description.summary: add a dmabuf fd to the params

request.description: Add a dmabuf fd with associated stride, offset, and modifier. The dmabuf fd must be valid.

request.name: create

description.summary: create a wl_buffer from the params

request.description: Create a wl_buffer from the added dmabuf FDs. The server will send 'created' or 'failed' in response.

request.name: create_immed
request.description: Create a wl_buffer with the given id immediately.

arg.name: buffer_id
arg.summary: id for the newly created wl_buffer

interface.name: zwp_linux_dmabuf_feedback_v1
interface.description: This object provides feedback about the dmabuf capabilities of the compositor.

description.summary: all feedback events have been sent
a preference tranche has been sent
indices of formats in the format table
